prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for aniline (14 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RKS in PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Finite-difference Mulliken partial charges from neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (-1, doublet) states. Most nucleophilic site: N (atom 1), f⁻ = 0.20452359. Most electrophilic site: C ortho (atom 3), f⁺ = 2.2975867. Dual descriptor, f⁰ also computed. Charge conservation: sum(f+) = sum(f-) = 1.0000. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed. No warnings reported. Results are chemically consistent with aniline's known ortho/para-directing amino group.
